title: SINJEUN 30 Pack Unfinished Square Plywood Wood 4 x 4 Inch, 6 mm Thick Wood Discs Blank Wooden Square, Wooden Cutouts for Crafts, DIY Projects, Door Hangers, Signs, Christmas Decor
features: EXCELLENT DIY MATERIALS - The ideal craft supplies for those who love making custom signs for friends and family. They are well-sanded, both sides can be used. The unfinished wood square are thin, lightweight and so easy to handle. They are smooth and take acrylic paints well.

EASY TO APPLY - You can use a soft cloth and apply stains and keep wiping it off or adding or use chalk paint. Easy to put stain, water sealer and or paint on the blank wooden Square for crafts to help protect them from the weather while hanging on an outside door.

IDEAL SIZE - The 1/4-inch thickness is great for door hangers. Requires very little sanding and dry pretty quickly, the Square wood plaque can be mounted on walls and doors. These square are flat and smooth, which are perfect to make perfect Christmas welcome signs for homes.

ENJOY MORE FUN - The square plywood woods take stain and paint well and you are able to make several different styles of art or crafts. It is perfect for adding vinyl and finishing with a clear coat. Use our unfinished wooden Square for wood burning, door hangers, personalized signs, wall arts, DIY paintings, party wedding ornaments, handicrafts, gifts, home decorations, etc.
PACKAGE INCLUDE - The package include 30 pcs square plywood wood, each size is 100 x 100 x 6 mm, meet your various creative needs.
description: ABOUT FEATURES: ♦Nice Square and disk, our blank wooden Square for crafts are easy to be sanded lightly and sealed for smooth and delicate purposes. ♦These unfinished wooden Square are great for whatever crafts or projects you are working on. 30pcs 4 inch Square wood discs are included. ♦Smooth surfaces which take paint and vinyl very well. This Square wood plaque is great to paint on and both sides are usable. ♦They are lightweight so you can easily add the wood square at any position with a strong glue instead of having to buy new hangers. ABOUT DETAILS: Material: Poplar Color: Wood Diameter: 4 Inches Thickness: 1/4 Inch ABOUT CONTENTS: Quantity: 30 x wood Square for crafts
